testcase.name: Post Demo 3

failure.message: Post.feature:29 - status code was: 200, expected: 201, response time: 454, url: https://postman-echo.com/post, response: {"args":{},"headers":{"content-length":"41","x-forwarded-proto":"https","host":"postman-echo.com","content-type":"application/json; charset=UTF-8","accept-encoding":"gzip, br","user-agent":"Apache-HttpClient/4.5.5 (Java/1.8.0_333)","accept":"application/json"},"data":{"name":"Carlos Rios","job":"QA Analyst"},"form":{},"files":{},"json":{"name":"Carlos Rios","job":"QA Analyst"},"url":"https://postman-echo.com/post"}

testcase.failure:
